waltz theme in B major; characterised by a rocking bass (tonic pedal on beats 1 and 3) and an upper melody outlining I and IV harmonies, with a chromatic inner-voice motion in bars 3 and 7–8 intensifying the approach to the half-cadence on V."},{"id":"B","bar_start":9,"bar_end":16,"description":"Middle section featuring a sustained F# pedal in the middle voice against a flowing eighth-note inner line, creating a lyrical, suspended texture; upper voice melody ascends stepwise over tonic and subdominant harmonies before resolving to a PAC in bar 16."},{"id":"B-extension","bar_start":17,"bar_end":23,"description":"Developmental extension of the B theme, briefly tonicising E major (IV) with full chordal texture, passing through vi and a chromatic sequential passage before a dominant half-cadence prepares the return to B major."}]}
